title: Sydney Trains & More - MTR
description: Sydney Trains (and more) for the MTR mod
body:
A Simple addon for the other train mod known as "Minecraft Transit Railway"

It does not any block/vanilla replacement textures, only content for MTR Mod, which obviously 
reequires Minecraft Transit Railway and MTE Addon (the addon allows for obj models instead of been limited to bbmodels)

Required Mods:
- [MTR](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway)
- [NTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte/)

Current Train List:
- City Rail S set
- Rockport/RTA Rattler 
- LRT Subway thing 
 

Note: Uses Default "M train" sounds, I tried getting custom sounds, but they wouldn't behave correctly.

 

Pack is currently in Beta, might get more content, might not, just an experimental side project, my main focus is still Immersive Railroading (aka the Santa Fe Pack set)
